calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sidney Berenstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Banking Association.
No appearance by defendant Francisco H. Howard, a/k/a Francisco Howard.
Default was entered against defendant on December 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 30, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 12, 2010.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants Jackie Hon and California Department of Motor Vehicles, were filed on December 30, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Banking Association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Francisco H. Howard, a/k/a Francisco Howard as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,264.53.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,526.57.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Late Fees - $145.00.
Costs - $501.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,262.10.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
